message:
feat(core): robust ALTER TABLE schema fidelity for rename-column and add-column

RENAME COLUMN now propagates to explicit index SQL and in-memory index
column/key_expression lists, plus self-referencing foreign key parent
columns.

ADD COLUMN now correctly handles CHECK constraints, COLLATE, VIRTUAL
generated columns, and inline REFERENCES (foreign key) clauses. It also
rejects PRIMARY KEY and UNIQUE columns (matching SQLite behavior) and
blocks STORED generated columns.

Includes five new tests covering index-rename propagation, CHECK
enforcement, FK enforcement, and rejection of UNIQUE/PK columns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
